mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG SET RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE ,PROC_TRG_YN = 'Y' ,PROC_HIST_SEQ = #{histSeq} ,PROC_YN = 'Y' ,RESULT_CODE = '00' ,MESSAGE = '성공' ,MSTORE_USER_STAT = '10' WHERE PROC_TRG_YN IS NULL AND CAN_TRG_SEQ BETWEEN #{firstSeq} AND #{lastSeq}

UPDATE NMCP_MSTORE_TERM_HIST SET RVISN_DTTM= TO_DATE(#{rvisnDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,RVISN_ID= #{rvisnId} ,END_DTTM= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1/24/60/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE END_DTTM= '99991231235959' AND USERID IN ( SELECT USERID FROM MCP_USER WHERE USER_DIVISION = '00' AND NVL(SYS_LDATE, TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND STATUS != '3' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG ( CAN_TRG_SEQ, CHN_CD, PROC_YN, USERID ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSTORE_CAN_TRG.NEXTVAL, '0000')) ,'04' ,'N' ,A.USERID FROM ( SELECT USERID FROM NMCP_MSTORE_TERM_HIST WHERE TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') = #{rvisnDttm} AND RVISN_ID= #{rvisnId} AND AGR_YN= 'Y' ) A
mapper.update:
UPDATE NMCP_MSTORE_SSO_INFO SET EMPEN= NULL ,LST_COM_ACTV_DATE= NULL ,MBR_GRD_CD= NULL ,SYS_CDATE= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,RVISN_ID= 'BATCH' ,RVISN_DTTM= SYSDATE
WHERE USERID IN (SELECT USERID FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG WHERE PROC_HIST_SEQ= #{histSeq})
WHERE USERID = (SELECT USERID FROM NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG WHERE CAN_TRG_SEQ= #{canTrgSeq})

UPDATE NMCP_MSTORE_CAN_TRG A SET RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE ,PROC_HIST_SEQ = #{histSeq} WHERE A.CAN_TRG_SEQ BETWEEN #{firstSeq} AND #{lastSeq} AND A.PROC_YN = 'Y' AND A.PROC_TRG_YN= 'Y' AND A.PROC_HIST_SEQ IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_MSTORE_PROC_HIST WHERE HIST_SEQ= A.PROC_HIST_SEQ AND RESULT_CODE = '00')
